recent_excerpts: A malicious website impersonating a TradingView AI agent deploys malware that hands attackers full control of victims' browsers, enabling account theft and financial data…
NGate malware, using AI-generated code, has infected the legitimate HandyPay NFC app to steal payment card data and PINs from over 220,000 Android users in Brazil, according to ESET.
